answer: The 2024 Summer Olympics in Paris ran from July 26 to August 11, achieving full gender parity. The United States topped the medal table for the fourth consecutive time, with 40 gold and 126 total medals.

results.title: Paris Olympics 2024: Athletes, Sports, and History | Britannica
results.snippet: From July 26 to August 11, 2024, Paris hosted one of the world's largest and most-watched sporting events: the Summer Olympic Games.
